summary: Sprint 7 Bio-Evolution Tracking testing. Backend: 23/23 tests passed covering all new endpoints. Frontend: DNA tab eligibility banner, Nexus console eligibility banner, BioScan trigger flow, ProUnlockModal component - all verified working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Expected behavior: clicking NEXUS SCAN triggers api.completeBioscan which returns 400 (correct - not yet 48h since baseline). Error is properly silenced and user proceeds to Challenge Forge. Console shows 400 error which is correct per 48h rule.

react_native_issues.issue: window.scrollTo() does not scroll the React Native ScrollView in web preview - stat cards are in the DOM but require touch/swipe to view. Not a functional bug, web preview limitation.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 31: SECRET_KEY has a hardcoded fallback - in production should fail fast (noted in previous iteration, still present)
nexus-trigger.tsx: BioScan onComplete correctly calls api.completeBioscan(token) and handles 400 errors silently - correct implementation
DNA tab: improvement_rates badge visibility depends on having >=2 scans - expected, chicago has only 1 scan so no badges shown. Admin with multiple scans would show them.
seed_data_creation: test_onboarding_creates_dna_scan_history created TEST_scan_{timestamp} account with onboarding completed for eligibility verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 7 Bio-Evolution tested and passing. chicago@arena.com is in validation_pending phase (38.5h remaining). Admin has DNA>75 and pro_unlocked=true. pulsedemo@arena.com has no DNA (no onboarding). ProUnlockModal at /components/nexus/ProUnlockModal.tsx confirmed working. All 3 nexus bioscan endpoints work correctly. Tab testIDs: tab-kore, tab-crews, nexus-trigger-tab (partial match with data-testid*='nexus-trigger-tab'), tab-dna, tab-hall.
rca_of_issue: No critical bugs found. The 400 error in BioScan console for chicago is EXPECTED behavior - the 48h validation lock correctly prevents early scanning. The silenced catch block in BioScanTrigger.onComplete correctly allows user to proceed to Challenge Forge even when bioscan is blocked.
